title: Implement environment variable substitution ($VAR)
description: Implement $VAR and ${VAR} substitution in command parsing. Before executing a command, replace environment variable references with their values. Support basic built-in vars (HOME, PATH, PWD) and a setVar/getVar API for user-defined vars. PRD gap: 'Environment variables not implemented — limits shell scripting capabilities'. Acceptance: echo $HOME returns value, VAR=hello && echo $VAR works, undefined vars expand to empty string.
